audit_items.proof_trace: s_entered is reset to false on the success path at L457, and on any revert path the entire transaction rolls back (including L418's write), restoring s_entered to its pre-call value of false — no try/catch exists in bid(), so callback reverts fully propagate. s_entered is only ever written in bid() (L418, L457); the reentrancy guard prevents re-entry, so no concurrent path can leave it true.
